calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (631 O'Farrell Street 06, S.F.)
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

There being no overbids, the sale was confirmed at $235,000 (an order for the same was signed in open court), bond was waived.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Auth. To Sell Personal Residence Of Settlor
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

Ms. Rasch stated that it was clear that the Trustee had the authority to sell the property but that she wanted to give the Beneficiaries the opportunity to object/oppose the petition if desired. In addition, she stated that the Settlor was in a nursing faclilty, that the Settlor would not be able to return home and that all parties received notice. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Janet Pond, CSR#5292. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
